name: States of Matter Particle Model
description: Create a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart demonstrating the particle model for Solids, Liquids, and Gases. The first page must be titled 'Solid State' and contain a rectangle container filled with at least 9 Blue circles representing tightly packed particles. The second page must be titled 'Liquid State' and contain a rectangle container filled with at least 9 Blue circles representing loosely arranged particles. The third page must be titled 'Gas State' and contain a rectangle container filled with at least 5 Red circles representing high-energy particles moving freely. Ensure all particles are placed inside their respective containers. Save the final flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/particle_model.flipchart.
